mapper.select: SELECT id, permission_code, permission_name, description, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted FROM permission WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY permission_code ASC
SELECT id, permission_code, permission_name, description, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted FROM permission WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, permission_code, permission_name, description, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted FROM permission WHERE permission_code = #{permissionCode} AND deleted = 0

SELECT p.id, p.permission_code, p.permission_name, p.description, p.created_at, p.created_by, p.updated_at, p.updated_by, p.deleted FROM permission p INNER JOIN role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} AND p.deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.permission_code ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO permission ( permission_code, permission_name, description, created_at, created_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{permissionCode}, #{permissionName}, #{description}, NOW(), #{createdBy}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE permission SET permission_name = #{permissionName}, description = #{description}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE permission SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{deletedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
